---
title: "Notes"
description: "A lightweight notes archive about devlogs, studying, AI tools, productivity, and finance notes."
---

::: {.site-shell .page-shell}
::: {.page-hero}
::: {.eyebrow}
Writing archive
:::

# Notes on building, studying, and tools.

This section is a lightweight archive for short thoughts, devlogs, and learning notes. The content is intentionally simple so it stays easy to maintain.
:::

::: {.filter-pills}
<span>Devlog</span><span>Study</span><span>AI Tools</span><span>Productivity</span><span>Finance Notes</span>
:::

::: {.notes-grid}
::: {.note-card}
<span class="note-category">Devlog</span>
### Designing a maintainable personal hub

<span class="note-date">2026-07-05</span>

A short note about making a personal website useful as a portfolio, project archive, and homepage.

[Read more](#){.text-link}
:::

::: {.note-card}
<span class="note-category">Study</span>
### Turning study topics into quizzes

<span class="note-date">2026-07-05</span>

How quiz-style review can make memorization more active and easier to repeat.

[Read more](#){.text-link}
:::

::: {.note-card}
<span class="note-category">AI Tools</span>
### Using AI as a study assistant

<span class="note-date">2026-07-05</span>

A practical note on prompts, review loops, and checking AI output while studying.

[Read more](#){.text-link}
:::

::: {.note-card}
<span class="note-category">Productivity</span>
### Browser workflows that reduce friction

<span class="note-date">2026-07-05</span>

Small browser adjustments can make research, reading, and writing feel less scattered.

[Read more](#){.text-link}
:::

::: {.note-card}
<span class="note-category">Finance Notes</span>
### Keeping finance notes practical

<span class="note-date">2026-07-05</span>

A placeholder for simple finance learning notes focused on concepts, definitions, and careful thinking.

[Read more](#){.text-link}
:::
:::
:::
